- task: PowerShell@2
  displayName: Debug publish project path
  inputs:
    targetType: inline
    workingDirectory: '$(Build.SourcesDirectory)\src\WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.IntServices'
    script: |
      Write-Host "Current directory:"
      Get-Location

      $project = Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Filter "WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.AzureFunctions.csproj" | Select-Object -First 1

      Write-Host ""
      Write-Host "Resolved Function csproj path:"
      Write-Host $project.FullName

      if (-not $project) {
        throw "Azure Functions csproj not found in debug step."
      }

      Write-Host "##vso[task.setvariable variable=FunctionCsprojPath]$($project.FullName)"

- task: PowerShell@2
  displayName: Publish
  condition: and(succeeded(), ne('${{ parameters.publishProjects }}', ''))
  inputs:
    targetType: inline
    workingDirectory: '$(Build.SourcesDirectory)\src\WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.IntServices'
    script: |
      Write-Host "FunctionCsprojPath:"
      Write-Host "$(FunctionCsprojPath)"

      if (-not "$(FunctionCsprojPath)") {
        throw "FunctionCsprojPath variable is empty."
      }

      dotnet publish "$(FunctionCsprojPath)" `
        --configuration ${{ parameters.buildConfiguration }} `
        --framework net8.0 `
        --output "$(Build.ArtifactStagingDirectory)"
